title: ML-DSA Overview
description: Introduction to ML-DSA (Module-Lattice Digital Signature Algorithm), the NIST FIPS 204 standard for post-quantum digital signatures based on the Dilithium algorithm.
learningObjectives: Understand the purpose and design goals of ML-DSA
Learn how ML-DSA evolved from the Dilithium submission
Compare ML-DSA with classical signature schemes
Identify key components: keys, signatures, and operations
Understand ML-DSA's role in the post-quantum ecosystem
